arc_1_village_roads.title: Arc 1: Village Roads
arc_1_village_roads.note: Secure the nearby roads and prove you can keep the frontier moving.
arc_1_village_roads.scene_focus: The dangers still feel local, practical, and close to home.

arc_2_watchtower_and_shrine.title: Arc 2: Watchtower and Shrine
arc_2_watchtower_and_shrine.note: Push toward the watchtower routes and old shrine lands where older threats begin to show themselves.
arc_2_watchtower_and_shrine.scene_focus: Ruins, shrine stones, and older dangers now carry more weight than simple road trouble.

arc_3_greyhaven_tensions.title: Arc 3: Greyhaven Tensions
arc_3_greyhaven_tensions.note: Merchant pressure, guard interests, and widening road politics begin to shape every decision.
arc_3_greyhaven_tensions.scene_focus: The frontier no longer feels isolated; larger powers are leaning on every route and bargain.

arc_4_cult_of_ash_rising.title: Arc 4: Cult of Ash Rising
arc_4_cult_of_ash_rising.note: Cult pressure moves from rumor to open threat as corrupted relics and ash-marked enemies gather force.
arc_4_cult_of_ash_rising.scene_focus: Even quiet places now feel shadowed by a larger cult threat pressing into the world.
